title: rubus horridus var. thyrsiflorus
intro: Rubus horridus var. thyrsiflorus, also known as the thorny bramble or blackberry bush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus horridus var. thyrsiflorus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
